g.text: Promise to help Pip before the ceremony.
Follow the ginger steam to the dumpling ...
Visit the paper folder and his cranes.
Stop by the tea cart with the tiny stove...
Look in at the toy mender's table.
Wander over to the fruit stand.
Head to the ceremony steps with Pip.
Carry the warm trays to the tables.
Join the folding table and pleat dumplin...
Take one tray at a time, slow and steady...
Stack three trays high for one big trip.
See what Auntie Mo says next.
Walk back to the lantern square.
Head for the ceremony steps with Pip.
Sort the crane papers by color.
Ask the tall noodle cook for a boost.
Wait for the breeze to bring it down.
Bring the rescued papers back to the fol...
Carry the gold square back to the folder...
Hand the folder the last tidy tray.
Walk back to the lantern square.
Head for the ceremony steps with Pip.
Pass out the little clay cups.
Refill the big kettle from the barrel.
Carry two cups at a time, nice and level...
Load up the whole tray in one go.
Head back to Granny Osha's cart.
See what Granny Osha has in mind.
Walk back to the lantern square.
Head for the ceremony steps with Pip.
Sort the tin of tiny screws by size.
Hunt for the runaway gear under the stal...
Keep lining the screws up in neat rows.
Wind the beetle's key as far as it can g...
Come see what Mr. Fez is reaching for.
Come see what Mr. Fez is reaching for.
Walk back to the lantern square.
Head for the ceremony steps with Pip.
Tie fruit bundles with the golden string...
Build it the classic way, big ones on th...
Go see what Auntie Plum is twinkling abo...
Watch what Auntie Plum snips off the spo...
Walk back to the lantern square.
Head for the ceremony steps with Pip.
Hold the songbook pages against the bree...
Try the little brass bells with the drum...
Ring the bells softly in time.
Give the big gong one mighty whack.
Take a bow with the band.
Listen to what the fiddler asks Pip.
Walk back to the lantern square.
Head for the ceremony steps with Pip.
Help Pip fold and write her wish.
Help Pip get her lantern ready to fly.
Gather the stall friends around Pip firs...
Lean in so Pip can whisper her wish.
Write Pip's wish just as she whispered i...
Add a second wish for the whole market.
Hand Pip the brush to write it herself.
Tie on the golden string first.
Get ready to light the lantern.
Let Pip light the wick all by herself.
Light it together on a count of three.
Ask the oldest keeper to light it the ol...
Bring everyone into a circle around Pip.
Get ready to send the lantern up.
Let Pip lead the count of three.
Hum the wish song and let it lift.
